transcript: Doom is trying to do the same thing here, he's swinging wide, he's giving himself a chance. If Carsten Vorholm has got this wrong at all, he could be vulnerable. But Vorholm, has he got his pacing right? It's going to be close on the line. Doom powers across the line, 45-25 unofficially. That would be a new national record for Belgium. Doom has looked perfect. We cannot believe what he's done here. It is a national record.
